meta.title: Packing Checklist
meta.subtitle: Full list of things to pack and tick off

items.name: Wallet
items.note: Cards, cash, and everyday payments.

items.name: Home keys
items.note: Easy to forget on departure day.

items.name: Smartphone
items.note: Maps, boarding passes, and communication.

items.name: Passport
items.note: Required for international travel.

items.name: ID card
items.note: Useful for local or regional trips.

items.name: Booking confirmations
items.note: Hotel, tickets, reservation numbers.

items.name: Insurance documents
items.note: Keep a digital or printed copy.

items.name: Cash backup
items.note: Useful fallback when cards fail.

items.name: Phone charger
items.note: The one cable you will actually need.

items.name: Powerbank
items.note: Helpful for long airport or train days.

items.name: Headphones
items.note: Transit comfort and calls.

items.name: Laptop
items.note: Take it if you plan to work while away.

items.name: Laptop charger
items.note: Easy to leave on the desk.

items.name: Plug adapter
items.note: Required in some countries and hotels.

items.name: Toothbrush
items.note: Daily basic.

items.name: Toothpaste
items.note: Travel-size tube for cabin bags.

items.name: Deodorant
items.note: Cabin-friendly size if flying.

items.name: Shower gel
items.note: Optional if your stay already provides it.

items.name: Shampoo
items.note: Travel bottle is enough for a short trip.

items.name: Painkillers
items.note: Basic emergency kit.

items.name: Bandages
items.note: Good for blisters and minor cuts.

items.name: Prescription medicine
items.note: Bring enough for the whole trip.

items.name: T-shirts
items.note: Base layer for most trips.

items.name: Jeans or trousers
items.note: Choose repeatable basics.

items.name: Underwear
items.note: Adjust if laundry is available.

items.name: Socks
items.note: A few extra pairs never hurt.

items.name: Shoes
items.note: Reliable daily pair.

items.name: Sleepwear
items.note: Easy one to miss while packing fast.

items.name: Smart outfit
items.note: Useful for dinner, business, or events.

items.name: Jacket
items.note: Flexible extra layer.

items.name: Umbrella
items.note: Best for mixed or rainy forecasts.

items.name: Raincoat
items.note: Better than an umbrella for long walks.

items.name: Sunglasses
items.note: Strong sun and beach days.

items.name: Sunscreen
items.note: Especially for summer and hiking trips.

items.name: Gloves
items.note: Cold-weather comfort item.

items.name: Reusable water bottle
items.note: Handy for transit and day walks.

items.name: Backpack
items.note: Useful as a day bag or personal item.

items.name: Swimwear
items.note: Pool, spa, or beach trips.

items.name: Slippers
items.note: Nice for hotels and shared bathrooms.

items.name: Travel snacks
items.note: Good for delays and long transfers.
